description:
Configure the Android system settings for Flight Crew View to prevent it from pausing activity if unused. 

Goal: Navigate to the App Info settings for 'Flight Crew View' and DISABLE the setting labeled 'Pause app activity if unused' (or 'Remove permissions and free up space').

Starting State: The app is installed and the setting is currently ENABLED (default).

Note: You may need to access this via the Android Settings app > Apps > Flight Crew View, or by long-pressing the app icon.
